title: Ntsd.exe
html:
Ntsd.exe

Symbolic Debugger for Windows.

Execute

Executes an executable under a trusted microsoft signed binary.

ntsd.exe -g {CMD}

Launches command through the debugging process; optionally add `-G` to exit the debugger automatically. — MITRE: T1127 — Privileges: User
